title: Create src/componentes/SeccionActualizacion.tsx MUI card rendering all hook states
description: MUI Paper card that renders each branch of the UpdateStatus union with appropriate UI per '## Components / 3. SeccionActualizacion.tsx' and '## Exit Criteria' in context.md. Spanish copy throughout (no ñ in identifiers — only in user-visible strings).
acceptance_criteria: Default-exports a React function component SeccionActualizacion (no props)
Uses useAutoUpdater() hook; does not import 'electron' or 'electron-updater'
Wraps content in MUI <Paper> matching the card style of other Configuracion sections
Renders new version + releaseNotes (if present) + 'Descargar actualización' button when kind === 'available'
Renders <LinearProgress variant='determinate' value={percent}/> + 'X.X / Y.Y MB (Z%)' when kind === 'downloading'
Renders 'Reiniciar e instalar ahora' button when kind === 'downloaded'
Renders MUI <Alert severity='error'> with friendly Spanish message when kind === 'error'
completion_summary: Created SeccionActualizacion.tsx (192 lines): MUI Paper card with exhaustive switch over all 8 UpdateStatus kinds, Spanish copy, never-check guard, inline formatBytes, reuses formatFechaCorta.
